title: Checkpointable Annotation
description: The Checkpointable annotation is used to indicate that a task can be safely checkpointed and restarted in case of failures or preemptions. It allows for fault tolerance and efficient processing of large datasets. The annotation is used to decorate a class, and it has no inputs or outputs.
